prTitle: fix: minor bugs in __eq__, cache eviction, and cleanup
description: Fixed bugs in BaseInfra.__eq__, cache eviction logic, directory cleanup, missing f-string prefixes in error messages, and a potential UnboundLocalError across 6 files.

prTitle: feat: add cache_contains() for read-only key lookup
description: Adds cache_contains(*args, **kwargs) -> bool to alru_cache for side-effect-free cache key lookups without affecting hit/miss counters or LRU ordering.
